trustedSourceSummary: No official consumer documents were found in the last 60 days, so the latest available official sources from 2025-2026 were used. Organizations used: Altroconsumo. Altroconsumo’s April 2025 test recommends ARBOREA and CARREFOUR CLASSIC as top choices for partially skimmed long‑life milk, citing quality, price and shelf‑life.
